note: Tyler's expert-prior seed hooks for the idea_r7 overnight run. High-stakes / novel-object / visual-peril openings believed to go viral when made properly. Used to (a) bootstrap the RAFT training set after render+score, and (b) as novelty anchors so generated ideas stay semantically distant from these AND each other.
seeds: Holding up a car while someone is trapped underneath
Lighting a fuse to some type of device (novelty on the device)
A giant switch to pull (novelty on the switch)
A giant button to press (novelty on the button)
A large speeding object like a car or train moving towards you
A bat or some type of weapon being swung at your head (novelty on the helmet or weapon)
Hanging from a really high place
Dropping an object from a really high place
Loading and shooting some type of launcher (novelty on the launcher, and the implication of what gets launched)
Slow-mo cutting through something with a sword
A large balloon overhead getting popped in slow mo
Activating a bear trap, then walking towards another bear trap (trap using credibility for something to survive it)
Opening up a large box (novelty on the box)
Being blindfolded in some environment like a volcano or bungee jump (novelty on the environment)
Holding a dangerous-appearing item wearing safety glasses and putting it into a beaker
Removing something from a really tall tower
Hanging from a rope while slowly fraying it with a knife
A large linear gear-rate mechanical switch
A massive piñata
Pulling a random thing out of a jar/bin
Having a massive thing falling over as if it's about to land on top of me
A wheel of some sort to spin until it lands on something (or some continuous motion with an expected outcome)
A music box exploding open with a bunch of papers shooting out, and grabbing a piece out of the air in slow motion
Sitting in a chair with a bowl on my head while getting it filled up with water (bonus: a heart-rate graphic on screen also serving as visual segmentation)
Blindfolded while an object is travelling towards my head and catching it out of the air
